summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Data Handling and Presentation in mathematics.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 6 mathematics explains the core concepts of Data Handling and Presentation. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
